signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Volume Markets Dominate Polymarket Trending Activity | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Volume Markets Dominate Polymarket Trending Activity | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's top trending markets focus heavily on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (30% odds on 200-219 tweets, $5M volume) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (18% on 1080-1119 tweets, $9M volume, $501K today).[1][5] X-related markets like "𝕏 Money
